title: tetrapterys inaequalis
intro: Tetrapterys inaequalis, also known as the Inequally-winged Tetrapterys, is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tetrapterys inaequalis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tetrapterys inaequalis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, or by using it as a tincture, and are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
